Name: Dora Honnywill (Neve-)
lore: A mastermind of battlefield geometry. Originating from Archery, their ocular cybernetics calculate every variable to dictate the flow of combat.

ability.name: ARCHERY OVERDRIVE
ability.description: Calculates trajectory and manipulates the battlefield using Archery precision to trap enemies and control engagement zones.

Name: Freddy Alberto Mezones Bolvar
lore: An elite striker specialized in rapid takedowns. Their Athletics background makes them a blur on the battlefield, equipped with high-twitch neural accelerators.

ability.name: ATHLETICS OVERDRIVE
ability.description: Channels pure speed and precision from Athletics into devastating burst attacks, overwhelming opponents before they can react.

Name: Alfredo Pealoza Carmona
lore: Built for the long game. This operative's mastery of Athletics grants them boundless stamina, utilizing synthetic oxygen-cyclers to outlast any foe.

ability.name: ATHLETICS OVERDRIVE
ability.description: Relentless continuous pressure utilizing Athletics stamina mechanics to apply stacking damage that wears down armored targets.

Name: Marko Hbenbecker
lore: A frontline behemoth trained in the brutal physical crucible of Bobsleigh. Augmented with reinforced sub-dermal plating to absorb kinetic impact.
